creator: ayan@ayan.net
text:
the mlt++ port was recently updated (at least on -CURRENT) and building shotcut from source works great.

the only issue when building it locally is that a required library may not be in our LD_LIBRARY_PATH if you install it somewhere outside of /usr/local etc.

i install it using:

$ cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${HOME}/shotcut

and i've been using it with:

$ pushd ~/shotcut/bin
$ LD_LIBRARY_PATH=${HOME}/shotcut/lib ./shotcut

The port should work now.
